_comment: Plan 05.1-07. Flagship Power Automate (Flow) read-first admin ops. 12 aliases selected from the 20-op __pwrauto__ catalog produced by plan 05.1-04.

rationale.__pwrauto__list-flows: Per-environment flow inventory; entry point for every Flow admin workflow.
rationale.__pwrauto__get-flow: Single-flow read (definition + state + references) for audit / diff flows.
rationale.__pwrauto__list-flow-runs: Execution history enumeration; required for SLA / failure-rate reporting.
rationale.__pwrauto__get-flow-run: Single-run detail read; pairs with list-flow-runs for drill-down diagnostics.
rationale.__pwrauto__cancel-flow-run: In-flight run cancellation; occasionally needed by admins to stop a runaway flow. Write op kept because it is a frequent admin safety-valve.
rationale.__pwrauto__list-environments: Tenant-wide environment enumeration; prerequisite for all environment-scoped flow reads.
rationale.__pwrauto__get-environment: Single-environment read; paired with list-environments for grounding.
rationale.__pwrauto__list-connections: Per-environment connection inventory; surfaces integration footprint referenced by flows.
rationale.__pwrauto__get-connection: Single-connection read for audit of credentials / scopes.
rationale.__pwrauto__list-flow-owners: Per-flow owner enumeration; identity surface for RBAC and audit flows.
rationale.__pwrauto__list-approvals: Pending approval-request enumeration; surfaces human-gated steps without manual triage.
rationale.__pwrauto__get-approval: Single-approval read for detailed audit / status inspection.
